name: Boiled Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large (10-quart) stockpot one-third full with water.
2. Add the lemons, potatoes, corn, onions, salt, and peppers to the pot.
3. Cover and bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
4. Let it boil for 10 minutes.
5. Add the crabs (use other small to medium crabs if blue crabs are not available), cover, and return to boil.
6. Once steam starts to escape from under the cover, let cook for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Turn off the heat and let it sit, covered, for another 10 minutes before serving.
